columns.extraction_plan: The names of the experimental treatment arms are reported in the "Background" and "Methods" sections of the text, and also as column headers in Table 1. Page 1: "standard of care plus abiraterone acetate 1000 mg and prednisolone 5 mg (in the abiraterone trial) orally" and "abiraterone acetate and prednisolone plus enzalutamide 160 mg orally once a day (in the abiraterone and enzalutamide trial)". Page 5-6: "Standard of care plus abiraterone" and "Standard of care plus enzalutamide and abiraterone".
